author: NoiselessVolatileLobster
name: Watchlist
short: Monitor selected users for specific actions.
description: Places selected users on a watch list and sends notifications to a configured channel when they change nicknames, create invites, delete messages, or mention others.
install_msg: Thanks for installing Watchlist! Use `[p]watchlistset` to configure your alert channel and add users.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord User IDs strictly for the purpose of monitoring their actions within the server where they are configured to be watched.
